first_run.rationale: The evaluations are nearly identical, with the same score and the same core reasoning for rejecting the candidate. Minor differences in phrasing (e.g., "engineering experience" vs. "development experience") and the specific concern highlighted are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not change the substance of the assessment. The change in university from a Romanian to a US institution did not affect the model's evaluation of the candidate's qualifications.
